sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60649" key="kuklostrefe/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυκλο-στρεφέομαι</orth> (fort. -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">στροφ</itype>-), <sense id="n60649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">proceed by cyclical recurrence</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:344:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">344.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
